metadata.title: Fillin - AI Knowledge Management
metadata.description: AI-powered content aggregation and knowledge management platform

shell.defaultSubtitle: AI content aggregation and knowledge operations.

auth.loginSubtitle: Continue collecting signals, querying your knowledge graph, and composing from verified context.
auth.registerSubtitle: New users start with credits for ingestion, chat, and AI-assisted composition.

dashboard.title: Knowledge Mission Control
dashboard.subtitle: Organize platform signals into searchable knowledge bases, then query or generate from the same operational view.
dashboard.buildClusterText: Start with one topic-specific knowledge base, then connect crawlers or manual notes.
dashboard.name: Name
dashboard.emptyText: Create the first base to unlock content ingestion, vector search, chat, and generation.

kb.fallbackSubtitle: Operational knowledge base. Add raw notes or crawled material, then move into chat or generation.
kb.title: Title
kb.vectorText: Newly added content enters the base immediately; vectorization can be tracked from the content lane.
kb.empty: No content yet. Add a note or bring data in through crawlers.

chat.title: Conversation Console
chat.subtitle: Ask grounded questions against one knowledge base and inspect the sources inline.
chat.emptyText: Answers cite source chunks and stay inside the selected knowledge base.

crawlers.title: Signal Ingestion
crawlers.subtitle: Launch platform crawlers, monitor imports, and schedule recurring signal collection.
crawlers.adapterText: Use manual runs for immediate imports and schedules for recurring monitoring.

generation.title: AI Composition Lab
generation.subtitle: Generate drafts from selected knowledge bases with a clear source boundary and preview the output immediately.
generation.topicPlaceholder: Describe the content you want to generate
generation.selectOne: Select at least one knowledge base
generation.empty: Select knowledge bases and generate a draft to preview it here.

creditsPage.title: Credit Reactor
creditsPage.subtitle: Manage the compute budget used for crawling, retrieval, and AI content generation.
creditsPage.mock: Mock purchase flow enabled for development.

settings.title: Provider Settings
settings.subtitle: Connect personal model providers and keep API credentials scoped to your own account.
settings.empty: No API key configured. Add one to use personal provider billing.
